markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Bea as new GM for NBD and MatterMate, discuss potential collaboration between fwd.digital and NoBoringDesign for content strategy and brand refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital to provide content strategy and creation services for NBD, starting with a kickoff on Jan 13th at 11am PST](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [NBD to engage fwd.digital for brand refinement and design support, particularly for fundraising materials in late January](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Both parties see mutual benefits: fwd.digital gains insights on content repurposing, while NBD explores new growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Marcel offered a comprehensive overview of fwd.digital's content creation process and tools](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Current Business Context

  - [Recently moved to a pod model with managing editors as bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Can only do 2 kickoffs per week, limiting new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Large pipeline of prospects and deals to manage](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Additional complexities: fundraising, converting to C-Corp, issuing equity](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Three-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
    1.  Analyze successful competitor content
    2.  Persona-based content creation
    3.  Unique product/service angle
  - [Utilizes AI-powered workflows for research, outline creation, and initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Human editors refine and finalize content](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing by week 3 of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Extensive pre-kickoff research on client, product, and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Use of AI tools and custom research agents for content ideation and creation](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Human editors heavily involved in review, editing, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Capability to handle high-volume content needs (e.g., 203 pieces for Sugo in 4 months)](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Proposed Collaboration for NBD

  - [Content strategy development post-kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Potential for content repurposing (written to social, video/podcast to multiple formats)](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Brand refinement and design support, particularly for fundraising materials](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Dedicated designer and PM to serve as on-demand production house for NBD](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### NBD's Business Context

  - [Launching another business in Q2 2024](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Sees content strategy as a potential scalable playbook for portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Fundraising planned for late January, requiring design support](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kickoff meeting scheduled for January 13th at 11am PST](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [NBD to include Mikayla (Head of Sales) in future discussions for ICP insights](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [NBD to send context on design needs to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [fwd.digital to set up NBD with a dedicated designer and PM for brand refinement](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Both parties to prepare for an evolving brand strategy, focusing on refinement rather than complete overhaul](https://fathom.video/share/JxzBRPFLP-k_tdaqYwqPnnQ9tNunY9zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
